query:
ALTER TABLE workshops 
ADD COLUMN startTime VARCHAR(10) NULL,
ADD COLUMN endTime VARCHAR(10) NULL,
ADD COLUMN duration VARCHAR(50) NULL,
ADD COLUMN venue VARCHAR(500) NULL,
ADD COLUMN totalCapacity INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN bookedCount INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN earlyBirdPrice INT NULL,
ADD COLUMN earlyBirdDeadline DATE NULL,
ADD COLUMN imageUrl VARCHAR(500) NULL;
